context: Source: Video 2: Intro to Component Builder (11:27). Evolution: charmeleon. MCP tool: synapse_solaris_create_variants. Live validated: T5 PASS (H21.0.631). Constraints: Material variants: duplicate Component Material nodes inside the Component Builder, each with a different Karma Material Builder.; Geometry variants: duplicate Component Geometry nodes, modify each, then use 'Component Geometry Variants' node to merge them.; The Component Builder automatically creates variant sets when multiple Component Material or Component Geometry nodes exist.
